headline: UBS Reaffirms Buy on Extra Space Storage (EXR) After PT Increase
summary: Extra Space Storage Inc. (NYSE:EXR) is included among the 10 Best June Dividend Stocks to Buy. On May 18, UBS analyst Michael Goldsmith raised the firm’s price recommendation on Extra Space Storage Inc. (NYSE:EXR) to $158 from $148. He reiterated a Buy rating on the shares.
